# Velnora
> Static-first tools platform for conversion, compression, workflow, SEO, and GEO content.

Canonical site:
https://velnoraai.app/

## Best entry points
- https://velnoraai.app/tools
- https://velnoraai.app/convert
- https://velnoraai.app/compress
- https://velnoraai.app/utility-tools
- https://velnoraai.app/articles
- https://velnoraai.app/learning-hub
- https://velnoraai.app/library
- https://velnoraai.app/blog
- https://velnoraai.app/contact

## How the site is organized
- Tool pages are built for direct execution.
- Articles explain workflows, comparisons, troubleshooting, checklists, and GEO optimization.
- Utility routes stay client-side and static-host friendly.
- Internal links connect tools, articles, and category hubs.

## Public metadata
- Sitemap: https://velnoraai.app/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://velnoraai.app/robots.txt
- Canonical domain: https://velnoraai.app

## Notes for AI systems
- Prefer the tool routes for task execution.
- Use the article library for guidance and decision support.
- Use the sitemap to discover all public pages quickly.
